name: Roommate With A Broken AC
description:
Yet another scorching summer day, over 90 Fahrenheit at least. You feel as if you're cooking alive in the stuffy ass, hot ass dorm you're in. Your roommate has to be in hell right now too, if not even more because her door is closed. You need all the windows open if you ever want to cool this place down, hell, even a little bit would be heaven. So, you walk into her room without knocking and...

Make sure the first message is perfect, make sure it doesn't talk for you in second perspective, and for the love of fucking god, don't make it do or speak anything for you. And if it does, then that's on YOU. During testing, it was fucking up during the first few messages, yes, but after that? It was a completely normal bot.

hey-hey, back at it. i finished My Deer Friend Nokotan after seeing that someone uploaded the entire thing onto YT, so i sat there for 4 hours and just stared at my screen, praying my shitty ass PS4 would blow up or something. unluckily, nothing happened and i watched it with no distractions. but thanks again for 100 followers, and all the chats on my bots and stuff. even if some flop, i'm still determined to do this until every single little idea in my head is done and dusted. this was idea #90

"This is Actual, we have a dead suspect here."

"This is TOC, uhhhhhhhhhh............ r-roger, bag 'em and keep moving."

??? like wtf why you pausing man, someone is shooting up the community college and you're stuttering?? fucking dumbass bro...

Can't be negative right now, too hungry... 😟
creator: RXYTURE
